steps.t: You have found a trail of footprints off the side of the road south to Snowbourn. You should follow the footprints and discover if anyone else escaped…
You have found a trail of footprints off the side of the road south to Snowbourn. You should follow the footprints and discover if anyone else escaped…
You have found a trail of footprints off the side of the road south to Snowbourn. You should follow the footprints and discover if anyone else escaped…
At the end of the trail, you have found a patch of blood-stained grass. You should examine the blood to determine its source.
You have found a Rohirrim and his steed slain at the end of the trail. You should inspect the warrior's wounds to confirm your suspicions about his at…
Gísil is in the Mead Hall of Garsfeld. You should bring news of what you have found to Gísil.
